mnemonics: A full adder has two inputs for carry and two for data
A subtractor is actually an inverter subtractor with borrow and 2 data inputs
keyPoints: Use basic gates to simulate the adder and subtractor
A 4-bit full adder has 8 inputs: 2 for carry, 2 for data and 4 for enable
A 4-bit subtractor has 7 inputs: 2 for borrow, 2 for data and 3 for enable
